lint.rule: Actionable recommendations require approved source baselines, LOCAL_FALLBACK_AFTER_SEARCH with matching search attempt, or LOCAL_BENCHMARK_OVERRIDE with explicit diff.

rule: Final actionable item/move/spread/nature/ability recommendations require per-slot meta baseline, searched local fallback, user request, or benchmark override.
